## What's wrong

<!-- A clear description of the problem. Is it a spec ambiguity? A schema that doesn't match the spec? An example that doesn't validate? -->

## Where

<!-- Which document and section? Link to the specific line if possible. -->

## Impact

<!-- What happened to you because of this? Did two implementations diverge? Did you have to invent a convention? -->

## Proposed resolution (optional)

<!-- If you have one. If you don't, that's fine — describing the problem is enough. -->

## Context

<!-- Anything else that would help. Which version of the spec, which implementation, etc. -->
